title: Infinite Capacity Cell
description: Add an AE2 cell which can store almost infinite items and fluids
body:
Add a cell which can store almost infinite items and fluids, making for those players who are tired of managing inventory (including the author himself).
- No crafting recipe. It can only be got by cheating in survival mode.
- It can store at most 2147483647 kinds of AE2 resources. It can store at most 9223372036854775807 units of each resource.
- It functions like compacting drawer:
  - It automatically calculates compactable items through crafting recipes.
  - It doesn't support customization for now.
- It costs energy 1 AE/t.
